objective: Operational checklist for loading real Mixer product-sales data into the fanpage bot knowledge layer.

phases.goal: Unlock grounded answers for product identity, price, stock, promo, and basic size guidance.

tasks.title: Identify real source for product + variant master
inputs_needed: DB export or admin export with products and variants
definition_of_done: Every sellable variant maps to a canonical product_id and variant_id
No sample/demo catalog is used in production knowledge

tasks.title: Normalize product + variant identities into canonical schema
definition_of_done: Canonical product records exist with display_name, status, category
Canonical variant records exist with sku/color/size where available

tasks.title: Load current pricing with timestamps
definition_of_done: Each price record has current_price, source, last_updated_at
Stale pricing is detectable from metadata

tasks.title: Load inventory snapshot/live feed with timestamps
definition_of_done: Each inventory record has available and last_updated_at
Inventory status can be derived as in_stock/low_stock/out_of_stock/unknown

tasks.title: Load active promotions/vouchers
definition_of_done: Promo records include active window, scope, discount fields, source, last_updated_at
Bot can distinguish active vs expired promos

tasks.title: Create size guide foundation for top-selling SKUs or collections
definition_of_done: At least top SKUs or top collections have size rules with source/confidence/timestamp
Bot has enough grounding to avoid guessing size

tasks.title: Publish first canonical product-sales knowledge build
definition_of_done: fanpage-bot/knowledge/product-sales-knowledge-v1.json exists or equivalent generated artifact exists
Validation passes with no hard-fail issues

tasks.title: Replay buyer-intent test prompts against grounded knowledge
definition_of_done: Bot can safely answer or correctly hedge for price/stock/size/promo questions
Known stale or missing facts trigger verify/handoff behavior instead of bluffing

phases.goal: Upgrade from basic fact answering to stronger consultative selling.

tasks.title: Load material summaries and fit summaries
definition_of_done: Products or product lines have verified material + fit notes with confidence and timestamps

tasks.title: Load care guide and grounded product FAQ
definition_of_done: Customer-facing product FAQs are grounded in reviewed facts, not ad-hoc chat memory

tasks.title: Load alternatives, comparison notes, and bundle candidates
definition_of_done: Bot can suggest nearby alternatives when a variant is unavailable or not a fit

tasks.title: Create payment/order ops knowledge companion file
definition_of_done: Order capture and payment rules are canonicalized outside UI-only logic

tasks.title: Define repeatable ingestion cadence and owners
definition_of_done: There is a clear daily or per-shift sync rhythm for live-sensitive fields
Each source has a named owner or owning team

hard_fail: Missing product_id or variant_id on records that must join canonically
warnings: Active products without canonical_url or image_urls
Size guide notes without explicit confidence
Material/fit notes copied from free-text without review

must_have: stale handling understood by downstream bot logic
